allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem d:\\Mokshify\\scripts; Get-ChildItem d:\\Mokshify\\frames | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\(\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName\).Count\) files" }; Get-ChildItem -Force d:\\Mokshify\\.git)

PowerShell($edge = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; $out = "C:\\Users\\venki\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\d--Mokshify\\118da8d9-74dd-4f30-9b82-bc21dc7ff908\\scratchpad"; $udd = Join-Path $out "ep-dom"; $dom = Join-Path $out "dom.html"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath $edge -ArgumentList @\("--headless=new","--disable-gpu","--no-first-run","--user-data-dir=`"$udd`"","--window-size=1600,900","--virtual-time-budget=9000","--dump-dom","http://localhost:8123/index.html?f=0.44"\) -PassThru -Wait -RedirectStandardOutput $dom; Remove-Item $udd -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Select-String -Path $dom -Pattern 'class="pod ' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(220, $_.Line.Trim\(\).Length\)\) })
